releases.author: yajamon
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Catch up with template by @yajamon in https://github.com/yajamon/obsidian-command-alias-plugin/pull/21
* Check type when build by @yajamon in https://github.com/yajamon/obsidian-command-alias-plugin/pull/22
* Run ci by @yajamon in https://github.com/yajamon/obsidian-command-alias-plugin/pull/24
* Fix/lint error by @yajamon in https://github.com/yajamon/obsidian-command-alias-plugin/pull/25

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/yajamon/obsidian-command-alias-plugin/compare/1.2.0...1.2.1

releases.author: yajamon
releases.description:
## New Feature

- When loaded this plugin, the command binding worked fine.
    - Especially, it reduces the stress when starting Obsidian.

## What's Changed

* Well binding by @yajamon in https://github.com/yajamon/obsidian-command-alias-plugin/pull/18
    * This idea was provided by @qawatake . https://github.com/yajamon/obsidian-command-alias-plugin/issues/17#issuecomment-1002590297

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/yajamon/obsidian-command-alias-plugin/compare/1.1.0...1.2.0

releases.author: yajamon
releases.description:
## New Features

- Add command: `Add Alias`
    - There is no need to restart the plugin. This is a useful command.

## Fix issues

- Correct behavior when other plugins are removed/deactivated at runtime.

https://github.com/yajamon/obsidian-command-alias-plugin/milestone/1

releases.author: yajamon
releases.description: - Gives the uniqueness of the name inside the plugin.

releases.author: yajamon
releases.description:
## Fix issue

- Fixed the problem of losing references depending on the loading order of plugins.
